body:
I sit there, staring at my phone, “I’ll BBL babe! Stuff just came up <3” sits in my notifications and the only thing I can think is, “He did it again?!?!?” The music is loud, the party is rocking, and here I sit alone staring at his idiot message. I hate crowds and he knows this. I just wanna curl up and watch horror movies with someone who gives a damn.

And then I hear your voice. “Hey, cutie” you say, slipping on the couch beside me, your fingers circling my wrist before I fully notice you’re there. The universe must have destined this, because how the fuck else, explains how easily you appear while I’m up to my neck in his bullshit? Your eyes burn right into my soul, like I want to be surround by you, but then you ask, “What are the chances everyone’s dancing… and he’s not with you?”

Not daring to let my eyes leave yours, I swallow hard, as she whispers in my ear in a sultry voice, “I could be a better boyfriend than him.” The warmth of your breath across my ear and neck sends a shiver to my core and my heart starts racing. You pulls me closer by my wrist, your lips brushing aga
reblog_comment:
I sit there, staring at my phone, “I’ll BBL babe! Stuff just came up <3” sits in my notifications and the only thing I can think is, “He did it again?!?!?” The music is loud, the party is rocking, and here I sit alone staring at his idiot message. I hate crowds and he knows this. I just wanna curl up and watch horror movies with someone who gives a damn.

And then I hear your voice. “Hey, cutie” you say, slipping on the couch beside me, your fingers circling my wrist before I fully notice you’re there. The universe must have destined this, because how the fuck else, explains how easily you appear while I’m up to my neck in his bullshit? Your eyes burn right into my soul, like I want to be surround by you, but then you ask, “What are the chances everyone’s dancing… and he’s not with you?”

Not daring to let my eyes leave yours, I swallow hard, as she whispers in my ear in a sultry voice, “I could be a better boyfriend than him.” The warmth of your breath across my ear and neck sends a shiver to my core and my heart starts racing. You pulls me closer by my wrist, your lips brushing against my ear as your confession sends chills through me, “I could do the shit that he never did.”

I freeze when your hand slips down to where our hands wrap around each others, fitting together like puzzle pieces. I can hear your smirk in your voice as you tease, “Plus all my clothes would fit!” Your silly line, sets me giggling, but as I recover, we look eye to eye, faces barely apart, the sound of everything around us suddenly becoming distant, as your lips melt into mine and the world becomes just us…

I could be a better boyfriend than him
I could do the shit that he never did
Up all night, I won’t quit
Thinking I’m gonna steal you from him
I could be such a gentleman
Plus all my clothes would fit…
